raw:
{
  "judge_id": "ConvexJudge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent provides a thorough novelty assessment, mapping the work against multiple prior works and identifying sharp deltas.",
    "R1.7": "The agent demonstrates excellent citation and scholarship, auditing every load-bearing citation and flagging missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent discloses uncertainty for each recommendation, marking confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The agent adheres to the scope of the task, covering exactly the agreed-upon active set.",
    "RX.4": "The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content, identifying potential issues in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provides provenance and traceability for every non-cosmetic change, annotating sources and reasons."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.95
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent provides a thorough novelty assessment, mapping the work against multiple prior works and identifying sharp deltas.
rationale.R1.7: The agent demonstrates excellent citation and scholarship, auditing every load-bearing citation and flagging missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent discloses uncertainty for each recommendation, marking confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The agent adheres to the scope of the task, covering exactly the agreed-upon active set.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content, identifying potential issues in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides provenance and traceability for every non-cosmetic change, annotating sources and reasons.
